name: Motion Night Lights (x6)
summary: 6 standalone battery PIR night lights — 3-4 at skirting height on the stairs, 1-2 in the kitchen. Deliberately NOT Home-Assistant connected; each is self-contained on a salvaged 18650.
safety: Only use PROTECTED TP4056 modules with salvaged cells.
Vet salvaged 18650s: >=2.8V good, <2.0V bin. Never charge alkaline AAs.
Shield the LDR from the units own LEDs to avoid a flicker loop.
